name: CineCritics
description: Full stack CRUD project built with JS, PHP + JWT, and SQL. CineCritics is an interactive website for movie lovers where you can search for, find, and review your favorite movies from a database. If you change your mind, you can always delete or modify your review. All review interactions require an account.

name: Book Realm
description: Full stack project that uses Vue.JS as the frontend framework and PHP with MariaDB for the backend. Book Realm helps you find your next read by suggesting a random book and giving you all the information need. It also provides a search functionality that gives all the information needed about the searched book.

name: To-Do-Son
description: To-Do app written in Python that transcribes all your tasks in JSON format. Uses the json library for an easier and cleaner code, and the art library to customize the terminal. Uses Jenkins with Groovy as the CI/CD tool to automate building, testing, and Docker Image building. Include a script to automatically run the image.

name: E-Portfolio
description: A personal e-portfolio built with modern web technologies to showcase my skills and projects and share my interests. It provides a clean and responsive layout to ensure a perfect experience on any device you're using.

name: ClimateTracker
description: ClimateTracker is a weather forecasting project made with React.js. ClimateTracker uses the OpenWeather API to allow users to search for any city and get its current weather conditions.
